app_id.description: Optional. The [ID of a Web App](https://firebase.google.com/docs/reference/firebase-management/rest/v1beta1/projects.webApps#WebApp.FIELDS.app_id) associated with the Hosting site.

site_id.description: Required. Immutable. A globally unique identifier for the Hosting site. This identifier is used to construct the Firebase-provisioned subdomains for the site, so it must also be a valid domain name label.

project.description: If it is not provided, the provider project is used.
